examples.text: هَٰذَا ٱبْنُ آدَمَ حَقِيقِيٌّ. اِقْتَرَبَ أَكْثَرَ وَقَرَّبَ ٱلْقِنْدِيلَ إِلَى وَجْهِ ٱلْإِنْسَانِ وَهَتَفَ
examples.english: This is a real human being! He came closer and shone the lamp in the human's face and exclaimed:

etymology.text:

Latin candēlabor.
Ancient Greek κανδήλη (kandḗlē)bor.

Borrowed from Classical Syriac ܩܢܕܠܐ (qandēlā), borrowed from Ancient Greek κανδήλη (kandḗlē).
